channel.title: Guitars on hartsuiker-guitars
channel.description: Recent content in Guitars on hartsuiker-guitars

item.title: Build OHT-26001
item.description:
A Modern Take on a Classic Shredder

The idea was simple: take one of the most influential guitar designs ever made — the single-pickup Esquire — and strip away everything that doesn’t need to be there.

The body is cypress — light, stable, and easy on the shoulder for long sessions. It has an open, airy voice that stays clear and articulate rather than heavy or boomy, and under a slick Osmo oil finish it takes on a natural, broken-in look that only improves with age.

item.title: Build OHT-26002
item.description:
A Modern Take on a Classic Shredder

The idea was simple: take one of the most influential guitar designs ever made — the single-pickup Esquire — and strip away everything that doesn’t need to be there.

The body is reclaimed Oregon Pine, sourced from an old workbench. It’s soft and notoriously tricky to shape, but it rewards the effort: light, well balanced, with a resonant, crisp voice that opens up under a slick oil finish and only gets better with age.

item.title: Spiral Bass
item.description:
Description Looking for a bass with incredible character? This custom-built bass features a striking, highly figured “swirly” grain pattern that stands out on any stage. Built by hand with a focus on natural beauty and solid, punchy tone.

A custom solid-body bass featuring hand-carved ergonomic scrolls, a multi-laminate neck, and a split-coil configuration. Made entirely from reclaimed wood with a natural shellac finish. Message me for full details, pricing, or to come try it out.
